_publications._publicationTitle: Characterisation of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours in neurofibromatosis-1 using heterogeneity analysis of

_contextSnippet: On 1.5-h scans, there was a significant difference between benign and malignant tumours for all SUV and other first-order parameters...SUVmax 2.28 (0.89–4.49) 7.01 (3.12–30.8) <0.0001
details: Significant differences between benign and malignant tumours for all SUV and first-order parameters at both 1.5h and 4h scans, with malignant tumours showing higher uptake (median SUVmax 7.01 vs 2.28 at 1.5h)
